sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_column Date32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_column) VALUES (1, toDate32OrZero('2000-01-01'));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_column) VALUES (2, toDate32OrZero('invalid-date'));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_column = toDate32OrZero('2025-06-01') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_column FROM test_dates WHERE date_column = toDate32OrZero('');
